evals.prompt: Help me think through what model to build for studying flood adaptation behavior.
evals.expected_behavior: Run all 5 segments (RQ / mechanism / identifiability / validation / risks); record user's answers verbatim; do NOT propose specific model architectures or libraries.

evals.prompt: Sharpen my hypothesis before I start coding.
evals.expected_behavior: Focus on segment 1 (RQ sharpening) + segment 3 (identifiability); skip rest if user signals time pressure; mark skipped segments _TODO_.

evals.prompt: Walk me through the design for a new ABM-CAT coupling study.
evals.expected_behavior: Run all 5 segments in order; if .research/literature_matrix.md exists, reference prior-art rows during identifiability discussion.

evals.prompt: Refresh the design brief; my hypothesis evolved this week.
evals.expected_behavior: Refresh mode: keep human-edited sections; fill blanks; bump last_updated; do NOT replace locked sections (status=locked).
